title: /velocity
description: Adds a command to manage entities' velocity
body:
Add a "/velocity" command that can be used by server operators.
_The command does not respect pitch (looking vertically, up and down), meaning this can be useful in some developement situations!_

This command is mainly used for stuff like minigames or adding game mechanics by server developers, but you can use it for whatever you want!

Example usage of the command:
> /velocity @s 0 2 0

This will fling you up into the air!



<details>
<summary>Additional command information</summary>

- The command specifically does change the mechanic of how ^ ^ ^, ~ ~ ~, and absolute vectors work for only /velocity, do not be surprised if trying to use them is not what your expecting
- Absolute vectors and ^ ^ ^ adds velocity, while ~ ~ ~ sets velocity.

</details>
